title: Xbox undergoes massive restructuring with layoffs, Game Pass cuts and a new focus on franchises
summary: Microsoft lays off hundreds of employees, reduces its expectations for Game Pass, and announces that it will focus on its most important franchises in an attempt to regain profitability.

title: Obsidian loses 25% of its workforce in Xbox layoffs
summary: The studio behind The Outer Worlds and Fallout: New Vegas suffers a massive staff cut as part of Microsoft's restructuring.

title: IO Interactive regains rights to Project Fantasy and closes its Istanbul studio with layoffs
summary: The Hitman developer splits from Xbox, gets its new game back, and lays off part of its team after canceling the deal with Microsoft.

title: id Software loses half its team and John Romero laments the layoffs
summary: The studio behind Doom suffers massive cuts amid Xbox's restructuring, and the co-creator of Doom asks to preserve its legacy.

title: Xbox layoffs affect The Elder Scrolls Online, which changes its roadmap days before release
summary: The Elder Scrolls Online studio suffers a new wave of cuts and delays its planned content, affecting the launch of Season 1.

title: Xbox allows several studios to regain their independence, including Arkane Lyon, Compulsion Games and Double Fine
summary: As part of the restructuring, Microsoft frees some of its studios to seek new owners or continue independently, although Arkane Lyon is still negotiating its future.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces the free games for July 2026
summary: Game Pass subscribers will be able to enjoy titles such as Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1+2, The Planet Crafter, and the 1.0 version of Palworld, among others.

title: Sony's decision to eliminate physical discs generates strong reaction from players with more than 170,000 signatures
summary: After announcing the end of physical discs on PlayStation, Sony breaks its silence and receives harsh criticism from the community, which mobilizes against it.

title: Blood of Dawnwalker, the new RPG from the father of The Witcher 3, impresses after four hours of gameplay
summary: The previews highlight its combination of combat, romance and intrigue, and point to it as one of the candidates for RPG of the Year 2026.

title: Original Nintendo Switch is discontinued in Europe as of February 2027
summary: The original console will cease to be sold on the European continent, which will also affect the availability of Switch 2.

title: Jaleco Arcade Collection Vol. 1 and Vol. 2 will arrive on PS5, Switch and PC this winter
summary: Two new collections of classic Jaleco arcade games will be released by Gravity Game Arise, including retro titles for current platforms.

title: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader receives a massive patch on Switch 2 and all DLC becomes free
summary: After a disappointing launch, the RPG receives a major update on Nintendo's new console, including all expansions at no cost.

title: Orbitals shows off its voice cast and cooperative space anime in new previews
summary: The co-op action game with anime aesthetics presents its voice actors and offers an experience that evokes nostalgia for classic games.

title: Subnautica 2 receives its first major update with changes in creature behavior
summary: The update allows stunning fish instead of killing them, and improves the artificial intelligence of underwater fauna.

title: Captain Tsubasa II: World Fighters shows its game modes in a new trailer
summary: The soccer game based on the classic anime releases a trailer detailing the game options and sparks nostalgia among fans.

title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2's lead actor says the video game industry has never cared about him
summary: Tom McKay, protagonist of the RPG, expresses his frustration for not having received more job offers after the success of the game, and criticizes executives.

title: New LEGO Pokémon sets leak and show figures from the franchise with high prices
summary: After the official announcement, leaked images appear of more LEGO Pokémon sets, while fans criticize the costs.

title: State of Decay 3 might not come to Game Pass after layoffs at Undead Labs
summary: Microsoft has reportedly withdrawn support from the studio and canceled the game's launch on the subscription service, contradicting previous announcements.

title: Lucy from Cyberpunk Edgerunners arrives in Apex Legends and CD Projekt thanks viewers of the second season
summary: The anime character appears in a new crossover event, while the studio praises fans for not spoiling the new episode.

title: Video game developers lash out at executives: 'they are disconnected from reality and greedy'
summary: Several creators, including a former Halo developer and an anonymous designer, denounce the lack of empathy and poor decisions of top management.
